footer.description: Apolitical and non-profit organization dedicated since 2021 to improving the living conditions of orphans, widows, and vulnerable children in Niger.
footer.support_text: Every gesture counts. Together, let's restore hope to the children of Niger.
Ouwar Marayu œuvre au Niger pour redonne: Ouwar Marayu works in Niger to bring back smiles to orphans, widows, and vulnerable families through concrete and sustainable actions.
Nous agissons sur several fronts pour tr: We act on multiple fronts to transform the lives of the most vulnerable.
Une mission portée par le cœur: A mission driven by the heart
Fondée par Mme Maïmouna Modi Abdoulaye,: Founded by Mrs. Maïmouna Modi Abdoulaye, Ouwar Marayu is a Nigerien humanitarian organization dedicated to supporting orphans, widows, and vulnerable families.
Chaque jour, notre équipe se mobilise su: Every day, our team mobilizes on the ground to bring help, dignity, and hope to those who need it most. Our action extends across all of Niger.
Kits alimentaires pour les familles les: Food kits for the most vulnerable families in Niger.
Soutien à l'éducation des orphelins et e: Support for the education of orphans and underprivileged children.
Accompagnement des veuves et familles en: Support for widows and families in precarious situations.
Appui à l'autonomisation économique des: Support for the economic empowerment of communities.
Prise en charge médicale et distribution: Medical care and distribution of first aid kits for the most needy.
Agir avec empathie envers chaque personn: Acting with empathy towards each person.
Rendre compte de chaque action et don re: Reporting on every action and donation received.
Respecter la dignité de chaque bénéficia: Respecting the dignity of each beneficiary.
Offrir un avenir meilleur aux plus vulné: Offering a better future to the most vulnerable.
Chaque action compte, chaque sourire est: Every action counts, every smile is a victory.
Grâce à Ouwar Marayu, mes enfants ont pu: Thanks to Ouwar Marayu, my children were able to return to school. I can never thank them enough.
L'aide alimentaire reçue pendant le Rama: The food aid received during Ramadan was a real relief for our entire family.
L'engagement de Mme Maïmouna est exempla: Mrs. Maïmouna's commitment is exemplary. She is present on the ground, close to the families.
Chaque geste compte. Ensemble, redonnons: Every gesture counts. Together, let's restore hope.
Join Ouwar Marayu in its mission. Your support can change lives in Niger.
🔒 Vos informations sont traitées de mani: 🔒 Your information is processed securely and confidentially.
votre intention de don a bien été enregi: your donation intention has been successfully recorded.
Notre équipe vous contactera pour finali: Our team will contact you to finalize the transfer. Together we build hope! ✨
Merci pour votre solidarité. Ensemble on: Thank you for your solidarity. Together we build hope!
Choisissez une cause ou contribuez libre: Choose a cause or contribute freely. Every donation is an act of solidarity that changes lives.
No donation cause at the moment.
Donnez le montant de votre choix: Give the amount of your choice
L'aide reçue a changé le destin de mes e: The aid received changed the fate of my children. They can now go to school and eat their fill.
Des familles déplacées ont besoin d'aide: Displaced families need immediate help. Your emergency donation is vital.
Chaque franc est directement investi dan: Every franc is directly invested in our actions. Zero administrative waste.
Rapports financiers disponibles. Vous po: Financial reports available. You can track the impact of your donation in real-time.
Nos équipes sont des membres de la commu: Our teams are members of the Niamey community. They know the real needs.
Every donation counts. Every life counts.
Rejoignez les {134}+ donateurs qui font: Join the 134+ donors who trust Ouwar Marayu to transform lives daily.
Des femmes et des hommes engagés au quot: Men and women committed daily to serving the most vulnerable.
Figure engagée et active sur le terrain,: A figure committed and active on the ground, recognized for her dedication to the children and vulnerable families of Niger.
Assure la coordination des distributions: Ensures the coordination of distributions and emergency interventions on the ground across Niamey and its surroundings.
Une équipe dévouée qui travaille quotidi: A dedicated team that works daily to deliver aid to the most vulnerable families.
Vous souhaitez vous engager comme bénévo: Do you want to commit as a volunteer or collaborate with Ouwar Marayu? Contact us to be part of this beautiful human adventure.
Une organisation humanitaire nigérienne: A Nigerien humanitarian organization serving vulnerable children and families.
Ouwar Marayu est une organisation humani: Ouwar Marayu is a humanitarian organization based in Niamey, Niger, committed to helping orphans, vulnerable children, widows, and families in precarious situations.
Notre mission est de redonner espoir et: Our mission is to restore hope and dignity to those who need it most through concrete actions on the ground: food distribution, school support, economic empowerment, and social support.
Notre vision est de bâtir un Niger où ch: Our vision is to build a Niger where every child has access to education, food, and a protective environment, regardless of their life path.
Son parcours est animé par une convictio: Her journey is driven by a deep conviction: every orphaned child deserves the chance to find hope again. It is this vision that led her to found Ouwar Marayu and dedicate her life to this cause.
Présente au quotidien sur le terrain, el: Present daily in the field, she personally supervises the distributions, awareness campaigns, and schooling programs set up by the organization.
Chaque action est guidée par l'amour et: Every action is guided by love and empathy towards the most vulnerable.
Nous respectons la dignité de chaque per: We respect the dignity of each person we accompany.
Nous croyons que chaque enfant mérite un: We believe that every child deserves a better future.
Nous rendons compte de chaque action ave: We report on every action with honesty and openness.
Distribution de vivres et kits alimentai: Distribution of food and food kits
Nous distribuons régulièrement des colis: We regularly distribute food parcels to the most destitute families, particularly during the month of Ramadan and during lean periods. These kits include rice, millet, oil, sugar, and other essential foodstuffs.
Soutien à la scolarisation des orphelins: Support for the schooling of orphans
Nous finançons les frais de scolarité, l: We finance school fees, school supplies, and uniforms to enable orphans and vulnerable children to pursue their education, the key to a better future.
Nous accompagnons les veuves and les fam: We support widows and families in difficulty through material, moral, and administrative support. Our objective is to strengthen their resilience in the face of life's trials.
Nous mettons en place des programmes de: We set up training programs and micro-projects to enable women and young people to generate their own income and gain autonomy.
Nous organisons des campagnes de sensibi: We organize awareness campaigns, solidarity days, and community events to strengthen the social fabric and mobilize good will.
Votre soutien permet de financer ces act: Your support helps finance these actions and transform lives.
Découvrez en images les actions d'Ouwar: Discover in images the actions of Ouwar Marayu on the ground.
L'administrateur peut en ajouter depuis: The administrator can add them from the admin interface.
Suivez nos dernières interventions and a: Follow our latest interventions and actions on the field.
Découvrez les différents axes d'interven: Discover the various areas of intervention of Ouwar Marayu in Niger.
Retrouvez toutes nos actualités and publ: Find all our news and publications in real time on our Facebook page.
Au-delà des saisons, la solidarité ne s': Beyond seasons, solidarity never stops. Support our actions for food, education, health, and emergency relief for vulnerable families in Niamey.
Chaque don est un acte de solidarité qui: Every donation is an act of solidarity that changes lives.
Veuillez entrer un montant minimum de 1: Please enter a minimum amount of 1,000 FCFA.
